title: Nodes with high memory pressure
query_text: Which nodes are currently under high memory pressure and at risk of triggering another OOM event?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: node01 is the only node with recorded high memory pressure in this snapshot. Its memory_events.csv shows RSS reaching 64023 MB against a 64 GB allocation, and the OOM kill event is recorded at 01:47 UTC. No other nodes show elevated memory pressure in the current snapshot. Sysadmin should monitor node01 for recurring OOM patterns if new similar jobs are submitted.
